verses.text: Moses climbs Nebo, and God shows him all the land. The view. He sees the promise from afar.
Moses climbs Nebo, and God shows him all the land. The view. He sees the promise from afar.
Moses climbs Nebo, and God shows him all the land. The view. He sees the promise from afar.
'I have caused thee to see it... but thou shalt not go over.' Seen, not entered. His sin barred him.
Moses dies there, and God buries him; none knows his grave. Buried. God Himself tends His servant.
Moses dies there, and God buries him; none knows his grave. Buried. God Himself tends His servant.
He was a hundred and twenty, his eye not dim; Israel mourns thirty days. Vigorous. He died in full strength.
He was a hundred and twenty, his eye not dim; Israel mourns thirty days. Vigorous. He died in full strength.
Joshua, full of the spirit of wisdom, takes his place. Succession. The work goes on.
'There arose not a prophet since in Israel like unto Moses.' Unequalled. He knew God face to face.
'There arose not a prophet since in Israel like unto Moses.' Unequalled. He knew God face to face.
'There arose not a prophet since in Israel like unto Moses.' Unequalled. He knew God face to face.
